How to Order

Simple, fast and secure — your mascot delivered to your door!

🎭

Ready to Bring Your Character to Life?

At Mascots Middle East, ordering your dream mascot costume is as easy as sending a message. Simply browse our catalog, choose your character, and reach out to us directly on WhatsApp. Our team will guide you through sizing, color customization, and delivery — all in one conversation. We accept payment in USD — 🇱🇧 Lebanon customers can pay via Cash on Delivery or Whish Money, and 🌍 all other countries pay via Whish Money international transfer, making the process smooth and stress-free. With production and worldwide shipping completed in just 15–20 days, your perfect mascot will be with you before you know it. 🌍
